Name: Measures must have a description
Description: All measures must have a non-empty Description property. Undocumented measures confuse report authors and block self-service BI.

Name: Tables must have a description
Description: All tables must have a Description property set.

Name: Visible columns should have a description
Description: Non-hidden columns used in the report should have descriptions to support self-service BI.

Name: Numeric columns should be hidden and replaced by explicit measures
Description: Implicit measures let users aggregate numeric columns incorrectly (e.g. summing salary across unrelated contexts). Hide numeric columns and create explicit DAX measures instead.

Name: Percentage measures must use percent format string
Description: Measures whose names contain 'Rate', 'Pct', or 'Gap' must use a percentage format string (e.g. '0.0%').

Name: Count measures must use integer format string
Description: Measures whose names start with 'Count' or 'Headcount' should use '#,0' format.

Name: Avoid NOW() and TODAY() in calculated columns
Description: NOW() and TODAY() in calculated columns recalculate on every refresh, which can corrupt historical snapshots. Use static date parameters or snapshot_date from the fact table.

Name: Avoid bi-directional relationships without justification
Description: Bi-directional relationships degrade query performance and can cause ambiguous filter contexts. Use them only when a many-to-many requires it, and document the reason.

Name: Avoid calculated columns in fact tables
Description: Calculated columns in large fact tables materialise on every refresh and bloat the model. Move the logic into dbt instead.

Name: Foreign key columns should be hidden
Description: Columns used only as relationship join keys (e.g. employee_id in fact tables) should be hidden so report authors do not accidentally drag them onto visuals.

Name: Avoid IFERROR wrapping entire measures
Description: IFERROR() at the top level of a measure silently hides calculation errors. Use DIVIDE() for safe division and fix root causes rather than masking errors.

Name: Partition name should match table name
Description: The default partition should share the table name for clarity when inspecting the model in Tabular Editor.
